query:
UPDATE projects 
SET tentativeInstallDate = DATE_ADD(createdAt, INTERVAL 35 DAY),
    estimatedInstallDate = DATE_ADD(rendersApprovedAt, INTERVAL 35 DAY),
    isInstallDateOfficial = 1
WHERE id = 900006 AND tentativeInstallDate IS NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute UPDATE projects 
SET tentativeInstallDate = DATE_ADD(createdAt, INTERVAL 35 DAY),
    estimatedInstallDate = DATE_ADD(rendersApprovedAt, INTERVAL 35 DAY),
    isInstallDateOfficial = 1
WHERE id = 900006 AND tentativeInstallDate IS NULL;
